name: Dynavap Condenser O-Ring Kit
summary: These spare O-Rings are compatible with all DynaVap devices, except for the OmniVap.
description: These spare O-Rings are compatible with all DynaVap devices, except for the OmniVap. Perfect for those in need of replacements. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
